summary: Completed comprehensive testing of architectural refactor: MongoDB removed, all data processing now client-side via CSV upload. Backend: 3/3 tests passed (health endpoints only). Frontend: 37/37 tests passed (upload modal, CSV parsing, fund selection, tree rendering, drawer, search, filters, export PDF, node interactions).
critical_code_review_comments: React Flow warning about nodeTypes/edgeTypes - already memoized outside component, warning is a false positive
Select controlled/uncontrolled warning - from Emergent script, not app code
seed_data_creation: No seed data - all data loaded via CSV upload at runtime
context_for_next_testing_agent: MongoDB has been REMOVED. Backend only serves /api/ and /api/health endpoints. All data processing is client-side via PapaParse CSV parsing. CSV files for testing: /app/backend/entity_master.csv and /app/backend/entity_relations.csv. Use Playwright file upload: page.locator('[data-testid="upload-entity-master"] input[type="file"]').set_input_files('/app/backend/entity_master.csv'). After upload, dataset state drives entire app. Fund I (fund_id=1) has 71 nodes, 72 edges.

initial_state: App opens with 'Load Entity Data' modal
Modal has two file slots (Entity Master, Entity Relations)
Load Data button disabled until both files selected
Initial modal has no close button (cannot dismiss)
csv_upload_flow: Selecting Entity Master CSV file works
Selecting Entity Relations CSV file works
Load Data button enables after both files selected
Clicking Load Data parses CSVs client-side with PapaParse
After loading: transitions to main dashboard
Upload modal closes after successful load
main_dashboard: Upload button visible in sidebar header
fund_selection_and_tree: Fund selector dropdown shows 52 fund options
Selecting Fund I renders tree with 71 nodes, 72 edges
Tree action buttons visible (Export PDF, Expand All, Collapse, Fit View)
entity_drawer: Drawer shows correct detail fields (Entity ID, Company Name, Jurisdiction, etc.)
search_and_filters: Search filters entities correctly (e.g., 'Equitix' shows 584 results)
re_upload_modal: Upload button in sidebar opens re-upload modal
export_and_interactions: Export PDF button works without errors
backend_health: Old MongoDB endpoints (entities, funds, relations, upload) return 404

console_warnings: React Flow warning about nodeTypes/edgeTypes (false positive - already memoized)
Select controlled/uncontrolled warning (from Emergent script, not app code)
